title: Things you didnt notice until later viewings
display_title: Things you didnt notice until later viewings
wikitext:
[]: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Sat Dec 17, 2022 1:14 am NTE is fuckin DENSE. Visually dense, and dense with story and dialogue. To the point that unlike where you COULD watch NGE multiple times to get more out of it, you pretty much HAVE to watch all the New Movies more than once to really GET them. I recently saw GKids' theatrical screening of Evangelion 3.0+1.01, and that shit was a spiritual experience, I'd wanted to see EVA in a theater since I saw that meta live-action shot of the theater in EoE on my shitty, school-issued chromebook back in 2015 after picking up the series initially as a joke to see how hamfisted and tryhard I thought it was going to be. Anyway, I didn't notice any differences with 3.0+1.01 other than slightly different subtitles, GKids probably had their own translators redo it after amazon's, but in recapping everything to my fellow EVA nerd GF before going, and then actually rewatching it, I DID notice a few interesting plot points/allusions I hadn't picked up on before. First off is Kaworu's donor, the original body his clone is based on. If NTE works on the same rules as NGE regarding clones, it seems very heavily implied that Kaworu's body is based on Gendo. This is due to him calling Gendo 'father' when Fuyutsuki and Gendo try to visit Tabgha base on the moon in 2.0, and in Kaworu's love of the piano, which is something Gendo also enjoyed when he was around Shinji and Kaworu's age [biological age, Gendo doesn't become a god until late in 3.0 lol] The second thing is what Asuka meant by "my original" when Unit 13 activates and fucks up New Unit 02 during the insanely fucking awesome Angel Blood sequence. During the attempted Instrumentality in the Golgotha Object, shortly before Shinji begins the Neon Genesis using the spear of Gaius, we see Asuka Shikinami's backstory, where it's revealed she was a clone as well, but unlike Rei, all Asuka clones were out and active at the same time. No clue how NERV Euro acquired all those souls but considering SEELE's lack of care for human life, I don't need to think hard to come up with an answer. Now, the Shikinami series were also unlike the Ayanami series in that they had to COMPETE to be an EVA pilot, and those who didn't live up were implied to have been killed. During a shot of all the Shikinami, when we see them all slowly disappear, only two remain, and one is the technically-legal-eyepatch-shikinami we know, but the other was left unknown to me for a while. Now back in the present/bad future, Unit 13 NEEDS two pilots to operate at full capacity, so obviously chunks of Kaworu left in one of the Entry Plugs isn't gonna cut it [this is also why a small silhouette of Kaworu can be seen when-]. Asuka notices that Unit 13 DOES have two pilots, and the other one besides Kaworu noodle soup, is "her original", the other Shikinami that survived the death trials, and judging by how easily she's able to convert our Shikinami to LCL and yank her from New Unit 02 and her DSS choker, this Shikinami was the superior twin. As for why our Shikinami was sent to NERV HQ in Japan when a better one was available, it was probably a trump card move- send in a damn good pilot and then if she gets killed, send in an INCREDIBLE pilot who's all that plus more to make absolutely certain the enemy is defeated after Shikinami 1 wore it down. Same strategy I used to use in Pokemon battles actually. The final thing pertains to Mari. We know that Mari's first time syncing and piloting a proper EVA was during the opening of 2.0, fighting the Third Angel "Tunniel". But, she's still clearly effected by the same Curse of EVA that the other pilots are effected by, and despite being much older than them to the point she went to high school/university with Yui and Gendo, she still looks that same age as in Gendo's fuzzy memories. So what if it's NOT piloting that causes one to become cursed with becoming a "Mock Lilin" and their body to stop aging? Mari's clearly had plenty of simulator experience, she's like the Raiden of EVA, so maybe it's just syncing with a Core that causes it? The EVA puzzle never ends, curiouser and curiouser

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sat Dec 17, 2022 2:50 am If Kaworu was confirmed as a clone of my man Gendo, it would make me like him 100 times more. And I already like NTE Kaworu much more than Shikinami and Ayanami 2. Anyway, I really like how HA has an entirely different feel once Shikinami is revealed to be a clone at the end of the tetralogy. Makes me think they had it all planned out from the start (at least from the second movie onwards). Her dialogue with Shinji in bed makes a lot more sense when you know she never had a father in the first place, so his problems pale in comparison. Also, Shikinami acts much more annoyingly than Asuka Soryu when they're preparing to fight the 8th angel (Sahaquiel, in the original series). Asuka is much more worried with her life and wellbeing, while Shikinami wanted to act on her own. That makes sense. Asuka wants to live, that's her main thing. It's what she outright yells in both episode 25 and Air. She's traumatized because of her mom. Shikinami knows that she's only alive because she outperformed the other clones. She needs to be the best. When she says to herself that she's different and special after that same fight, she's not talking about Shinji and Ayanami, but her own selves. She's better than them and will survive. So, yeah, nice touches there.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Dec 17, 2022 6:31 am AdamMalkovitch wrote: First off is Kaworu's donor, the original body his clone is based on. If NTE works on the same rules as NGE regarding clones, it seems very heavily implied that Kaworu's body is based on Gendo. This is due to him calling Gendo 'father' when Fuyutsuki and Gendo try to visit Tabgha base on the moon in 2.0, and in Kaworu's love of the piano, which is something Gendo also enjoyed when he was around Shinji and Kaworu's age [biological age, Gendo doesn't become a god until late in 3.0 lol]

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by nerv bae » Sat Dec 17, 2022 10:49 am AdamMalkovitch wrote: First off is Kaworu's donor, the original body his clone is based on. If NTE works on the same rules as NGE regarding clones, it seems very heavily implied that Kaworu's body is based on Gendo. This is due to him calling Gendo 'father' when Fuyutsuki and Gendo try to visit Tabgha base on the moon in 2.0, and in Kaworu's love of the piano, which is something Gendo also enjoyed when he was around Shinji and Kaworu's age [biological age, Gendo doesn't become a god until late in 3.0 lol]

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Dec 17, 2022 6:01 pm BernardoCairo wrote: If Kaworu was confirmed as a clone of my man Gendo, it would make me like him 100 times more. And I already like NTE Kaworu much more than Shikinami and Ayanami 2.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sat Dec 17, 2022 8:44 pm ElMariachi wrote: Although Kaworu can't be a clone of Gendo, we see in Thrice what Gendo looked like when he was a teenager (basically a carbon copy of Shinji with glasses), and Kaworu looks nothing like that.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Dec 18, 2022 4:01 pm Konja7 wrote: However, I think Kaworu could be created using Gendo's DNA. Even if they use Gendo's DNA, the result is not necessarily going to be an identical clone. This would explain the connections they draw between Gendo, Kaworu and Shinji.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Cola-09 » Sun Dec 18, 2022 5:01 pm Right before Asukas original pulls her out of Unit 2 we see Kaworu in the tiny crack behind her. I suppose this visual reaffirms that both Asuka and Kaworu are the two main souls inside Eva 13.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by nerv bae » Sun Dec 18, 2022 5:33 pm AdamMalkovitch wrote: NTE is fuckin DENSE. Visually dense, and dense with story and dialogue. To the point that unlike where you COULD watch NGE multiple times to get more out of it, you pretty much HAVE to watch all the New Movies more than once to really GET them.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Dec 18, 2022 7:17 pm ElMariachi wrote: There are no indication that Kaworu is made from Gendo's DNA, except him calling him "father" in 2.0, but I remember being noted that in Japan young people may call "father" the dad of their very close friends or lover, and Kaworu is absolutely obsessed by Shinji.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Archer » Tue Dec 20, 2022 8:22 am Rei being Yui’s clone isn’t a subtle implication.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by MuscleRobo » Tue Dec 20, 2022 10:21 am Kensuke's fridge is covered with Ultraman magnets. I know! Not as deep as some of the other things being brought up but I didn't notice it until my second watch!

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue Dec 20, 2022 2:08 pm Konja7 wrote: Really? It always seemed to me that Anno liked to leave mysteries unanswered directly. For example: If I'm not mistaken, it was never directly confirmed Rei was Yui's clone in NGE. There were hints about that, but the direct confirmation happened in NTE (3.0).

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Tue Dec 20, 2022 10:07 pm ElMariachi wrote: How awkward it would be if it turns that out of Shinji's four love interested, half of them are clones of his father or mother. Talk about taking the Oedipius Complex from NGE and pushing it up to eleven!

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Konja7 » Wed Dec 21, 2022 3:18 am BernardoCairo wrote: Q puts a good focus on how knowledgeable and experienced Kaworu really is. He's, before anything else, Shinji's role model (almost a father figure of sorts in some scenes, like Kaji). And the last movie just strengthened this connection between the two (same EVA, similar motivations, the piano)...

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Dec 21, 2022 2:04 pm It's an interesting angle to take into consideration, but I'm not positive it holds up to be applied as broadly as you do it. Despite the connections that all of the pilots have to the Adams this time around, the parallels are obviously still the most overt for Kaworu and Rei, so they definitely have the parental figure baked into them by backstory somewhat, combined with the behaviour towards Shinji that you point out; I wouldn't go as far as saying that they are primarily coded as that, but there absolutely is merit to thinking that angle through some more

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Thu Dec 22, 2022 3:57 pm BernardoCairo wrote: This is left ambiguous on purpose, I think. Did she really love him or not? Did Asuka really love him or was she programmed to like him too? Probably not, but I think it's a question that crossed her mind at some point.

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Konja7 » Thu Dec 22, 2022 8:03 pm ElMariachi wrote: To keep with the theme of this thread, do you have examples of ways Rei represents a mother figure to him?

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Dec 23, 2022 12:22 am ElMariachi wrote: When are there connections between the pilots and the Adams? Aside Kaworu for the obvious reason of him being the First Angel, I don't see any, Rei still has her connection to Lilith by how she keeps taking Rei's face (the original one and the giant fetus head thingy in 3.0, and photoshop GNR in Thrice), but I don't see anything for Shinji, Asuka and Mari. (unless you count the Ninth Angel living inside Asuka)

[]: Re: Things you didn't notice until later viewings             Quote Post by nerv bae » Fri Dec 23, 2022 9:09 am Blockio wrote: It's less on the nose, but there's a fair share of screenwriting stuff drawing those parallels; Reichu has a good chunk of it written up, from before Shin so specifics vary a bit, but most of it has survived fairly gracefully

To the point that unlike where you COULD watch NGE multiple times to get more out of it, you pretty much HAVE to watch all the New Movies more than once to really GET them.
